title: cenchrus ciliaris
intro: Cenchrus ciliaris, also known as Buffelgrass or Cenchrus, is a perennial grass species native to Africa and Asia, widely cultivated for its drought-resistant properties. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Cenchrus ciliaris is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
